text: I manage hundreds of items. My biggest issue is the time it takes to create consistent titles and descriptions.
I never know if my price is competitive until an item sits unsold for weeks.
I want automation, but I still need to approve everything before it goes live.
As a new seller, shipping and pricing are the most confusing parts.
I care less about AI and more about getting my inventory in front of serious buyers.
Trust matters. I worry about scams and disputes more than creating the listing.
